creator: christoph.larsen@synalinq.com
text:
Here is my /etc/make.conf (inside the respective jail):

# set CPU type
CPUTYPE?=athlon64

# use pkgng
WITH_PKGNG=yes

# no profiling
NO_PROFILE=YES

# always compile MySQL with SSL, UTF-8 support and optimized
.if ${.CURDIR:M*/databases/mysql*}
    WITH_OPENSSL=yes
    WITHOUT_YASSL=yes
    WITH_XCHARSET=utf8
    BUILD_OPTIMIZED=yes
.endif

# we run a headless server
OPTIONS_UNSET=X11

# give jails their own ports management area
WRKDIRPREFIX=           /var/ports
DISTDIR=                /var/ports/distfiles
PACKAGES=               /var/ports/packages
INDEXDIR=               /var/ports
